text:
Miera Mountains (, Miera-san) are mountains in the Republic of Rokario. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 218 

Overview

The mountains of Miera are a group of mountains that are located between the Pata and Ininge cities, in the Republic of Rokario. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

A newscaster reports that after the former Squadron Leader Cheetu's confrontation with the police within Pata City; he escapes to the Miera Mountains but not before proclaiming that he'll return the following day and demanding that they "Bring someone faster". Worried that Gon may encounter Cheetu during his date with Palm, Killua checks the location of the Miera Mountains on his Beatle-07 map. To his relief, the mountains are two towns over from Doli City.
